---
title: "看板|医疗产业"
author: "胡华平"
format: dashboard
---



## Column {height=90%}

```{r}
#| title: "核酸检测阳性率（每周，%）"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(here)
script_path <- here("trend", "code", "viz-cdc-breath-disease.R")
source(script_path)
p_breath_plotly
```


```{r}
#| title: "新冠重症病例数量（月度，例）"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
script_path <- here("trend", "code", "viz-covid-trend.R")
source(script_path)
p_covid_plotly
```


## Row {height=10%}

::: {.card}

使用Quarto Dashboard技术围绕医疗产业话题展示相关趋势。

> 数据来源：中国疾病预防控制中心 <https://www.chinacdc.cn/jksj/jksj04_14275/> 
:::
